name: ASRock X870 TAICHI CREATOR ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8000+(OC) - 4x M.2 Slots - 2x USB4 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - 10Gbps LAN - 5Gbps LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4
shortName: ASRock X870 TAICHI CREATOR ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 2x PCIe 5.0
description: High-end AM5 ATX motherboard with dual PCIe 5.0 x16, DDR5-8000+, and Wi-Fi 7 for creator workstations.
